items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component establishes a recursive variable t with initial value 0.1

items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component declares variable distanceFromFence

items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component calculates distanceFromFence by calling circleLinearization function with parameter t

items.text: After time value exceeds recovery time of 1.7, distanceFromFence must be greater than previous time step's distanceFromFence

items.text: System failure time shall be set to 9.5
